code_patches.description: Adding an else clause to handle the case where no AMF is selected, which helps in debugging and prevents silent failures.

code_patches.original_code: NGAP_WARN("No AMF is associated to the gNB\n");
code_patches.patched_code:
NGAP_WARN("No AMF is associated to the gNB\n");
    rrc_gNB_generate_RRCReject(instance_p, UEfirstReq->gNB_ue_ngap_id);
code_patches.line_numbers: after line containing "NGAP_WARN("No AMF is associated to the gNB\n");"
code_patches.description: Calling rrc_gNB_generate_RRCReject to properly reject the connection request instead of just logging the error.

config_patches.description: Must match deployment context value to ensure the gNB can correctly route messages to the AMF.
Must match deployment context value to ensure the gNB can correctly communicate with the AMF.
